final:
module RefModule(  
    input clk,  
    input [7:0] plaintext,  
    input [7:0] key,  
    output reg [7:0] ciphertext  
);  
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin  
        ciphertext <= plaintext ^ key;  
    end  
endmodule
